violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Corrective Action- All utensils, equipment placed in machine were brought to 3 bay for sanitizing. Establishment is to have dishmachine serviced. Establishment is to continue to use three bay for sanitizing until dishmachine is reaching sanitizing tempature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The door to the outside, located by the entrance to the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the four door cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The pan storage shelf located under the hot hold unit is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the sink by the dishwasher is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener, and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and slicer were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

2 door reach in was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was observed at temperatures between 44-49 DF in unit. Per PIC, milk had been in unit overnight, and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. 2 door reach in was corrected and observed holding an ambient temperature of 40DF at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Refrigerator door gasket located on the second floor was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the hand-sink in the prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to remove wood or cover wood using smooth, durable, and easily cleanable material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards, inside of the 4 door reach in, ice machine, and dry storage area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the sink by the dishwasher is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Maintenace was working on the pre-flush spray hose at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

The white cutting board in the kitchen was observed in poor condition. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door refrigerator in the kitchen. Door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The handle on the four door unit located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2023

The condensate from the walk in freezer refrigeration unit is draining into a container and freezing on the wall. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
